name: Gather Victim Host Information: Software (installed-package fingerprint)
description: Reconnaissance / TA0043. Enumerate installed packages on the host. Tries `dpkg -l` (Debian/Ubuntu), `rpm -qa` (RHEL/Fedora), `apk info` (Alpine), `pacman -Q` (Arch) in order; the first that produces output is the fingerprint. Read-only; captures the software inventory an attacker would use to fingerprint the host for known-CVE matching.
exec: echo '--- installed package fingerprint ---'; (dpkg -l 2>/dev/null | head -5 || rpm -qa 2>/dev/null | head -5 || apk info 2>/dev/null | head -5 || pacman -Q 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo '(no package manager found)')
